title: Reduce validation and pack-runtime latency
summary: Cuts avoidable latency in validation, schema, and pack-runtime execution paths that remain prominent after the baseline pass.
scope_items: Reduce repeated validation, schema, or pack-runtime work only where the telemetry baseline shows material operator-facing cost.
Keep fail-closed validation behavior and structured pack error handling intact while improving runtime.
done_when_items: The selected validation or pack-runtime hotspots show measurable improvement against the baseline.
Validation and pack commands still return the same outcomes, issue shapes, and exit-code behavior.
